description_long: This kiosk features a robust, angular structure with a predominantly purple and black color scheme accented by metallic fasteners. The front is adorned with a large, wood-framed digital display panel featuring intricate, futuristic graphics and yellow geometric icons. Below the screen, the kiosk body is constructed from metal panels, with the lower section displaying a gold Chinese character on a purple background. The sides reveal a stepped, Z-shaped profile, with the upper and lower compartments separated by a central black column. The rear is plain, with the wood panel's back visible and the purple metal casing wrapping around the structure. The overall design suggests a high-tech, interactive urban kiosk, possibly for information or ticketing, with a blend of modern and slightly industrial aesthetics.
description: A high-tech, purple and black kiosk with a wood-framed digital display and gold accents, featuring a stepped, angular design and futuristic graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wood-framed digital display with intricate graphics, gold icons, and a purple lower section with a gold Chinese character.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the Z-shaped profile, stepped compartments, and the thickness of the wood-framed display.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the plain wood panel back, purple metal casing, and the open lower compartment.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular structure and the side of the display panel.
attribute_signage_type: Digital display integrated into the upper front, with gold icons and a gold Chinese character printed on the lower front panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat wood-framed top panel, slightly overhanging the main body, with no visible awnings or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with industrial and high-tech influences
